context: Bitcoin and altcoins consolidate near weekly lows as the market awaits Senate CLARITY Act markup proceedings. Regulatory tailwinds from the White House crypto agenda provide fundamental support, but near-term price action remains range-bound with modest negative momentum across major cryptos.

tickers.thesis: BTC consolidates in a narrow band amid legislative optimism; ICT Order Flow Dynamics show institutional buyers defending key support zones. Breakthrough above $81,500 targets $84,200; breakdown below $77,900 risks a deeper correction into the $75,000 zone.
levels: Weekly supply node; key rejection zone

setup.invalidation: Break and close below $77,200 invalidates bullish structure

catalysts: CLARITY Act Senate markup timing (expected early June; July 4 target per White House)
Macro risk-off from broader equities; USD strength volatility
CME Options positioning shifts; put-heavy bias may support call buyers
Fed commentary on rate trajectory; inflation data releases mid-month
liq_above: Intraday supply; stops above weekly resistance

tickers.thesis: Ethereum underperforms BTC on the week, testing ICT Order Block support near $2,200. Bullish divergence on lower timeframes suggests buyers may defend this zone; reclaim of $2,350+ needed to confirm upside continuation into $2,450.
catalysts: Ethereum staking rate changes; network upgrade anticipation
Altseason rotation; relative strength vs. BTC
DeFi TVL trends and yield farming incentives
Layer 2 scaling adoption; institutional Ethereum inflows
Macro risk sentiment; correlation to tech equity indices

tickers.thesis: XRP consolidates after recent whale accumulation (90M XRP moved to Coinbase); Ripple CEO's CLARITY Act urgency signals institutional confidence. ICT FVG below $1.35 provides downside cushion; breakout above $1.48 targets $1.65 on regulatory tailwinds.
levels: ICT Fair Value Gap; demand zone
catalysts: CLARITY Act markup and passage odds (Ripple CEO tracking closely)
Whale accumulation signals; institutional on-ramp via Coinbase
Ripple ODL corridor expansion; enterprise adoption announcements
Regulatory clarity premium; XRP use case legitimacy
Altcoin rotation during risk-on periods; BTC correlation changes

insights.title: CLARITY Act Legislative Momentum Accelerates
insights.body: White House targets July 4 passage; Senate Banking Committee prepares markup after months of delays. Ripple CEO warns markup delay risks precipitous drop in passage odds, signaling industry urgency. Regulatory tailwinds support bullish thesis for XRP and broader crypto sector.

insights.title: Institutional Whale Positioning in XRP
insights.body: 90M XRP tokens moved to Coinbase (mid-April); coupled with Ripple's legislative activism, signals institutional accumulation ahead of CLARITY Act. ICT Order Flow analysis shows demand zone defense at $1.35, supporting near-term upside bias.

insights.title: Neutral Bias on BTC/ETH Pending Regulatory Clarity
insights.body: Both majors consolidate near weekly lows with modest negative momentum but strong institutional support at Order Blocks. Breakthrough of weekly resistances ($81.5K BTC, $2.35K ETH) likely requires either CLARITY Act markup confirmation or macro risk-off stabilization.
